tagline: 90 Years of Lock & Security Expertise — Cambridge Trusts Commonwealth
hero_subtitle: Family-owned since 1936, Commonwealth Lock Company is a nationally recognized wholesale distributor of locksmith supplies, door hardware, and safes. Visit our Cambridge showroom or order from anywhere in the U.S.
service_area_description: Serving Cambridge, Somerville, Boston, Arlington, Watertown, and customers nationwide through wholesale distribution.
seo_title: Commonwealth Lock Company | Locksmith Supply & Door Hardware in Cambridge, MA
seo_description: Commonwealth Lock Company — family-owned since 1936. National wholesale distributor of locksmith supplies, door hardware, and safes in Cambridge, MA. BBB A+ rated.
services_subtitle: From premium lock hardware to high-security safes — wholesale pricing and expert product knowledge since 1936.
reviews_subtitle: Locksmiths and contractors across the country rely on Commonwealth Lock for quality products and dependable service.
cta_heading: Need lock hardware, safes, or expert advice?
cta_subtitle: Visit our Cambridge showroom on Mass Ave or call us for wholesale pricing and fast nationwide shipping.
footer_description: Family-owned wholesale distributor of locksmith supplies, door hardware, and safes since 1936. BBB A+ accredited. Located at 1853 Mass Ave, Cambridge, MA.

services_featured.name: Locksmith Supply Distribution
services_featured.description: National wholesale distributor of lock cylinders, key blanks, locksmith tools, and professional-grade hardware from every major manufacturer.

services_secondary.name: Door Hardware Sales
services_secondary.description: Commercial and residential door hardware including lever sets, deadbolts, closers, hinges, and exit devices from top brands.

services_accent.name: Safe Sales & Consultation
services_accent.description: Residential, commercial, and high-security safes for every application — from fire-rated home safes to jeweler-grade vaults. Expert guidance included.

services_wide.name: Special Orders & Nationwide Shipping
services_wide.description: Can't find what you need? We source specialty lock and hardware products from our extensive manufacturer network and ship anywhere in the U.S.

about_features.title: Family-Owned Since 1936
about_features.description: Three generations of lock and hardware expertise. Commonwealth Lock is one of the oldest continuously operating locksmith suppliers in the country.

about_features.title: BBB A+ Accredited
about_features.description: Accredited by the Better Business Bureau since 1990 with an A+ rating — a testament to decades of trust and fair dealing.

about_features.title: National Wholesale Distribution
about_features.description: We ship locksmith supplies, door hardware, and safes to professionals and businesses across the entire United States.

reviews.name: Professional Locksmith
reviews.text: Been buying from Commonwealth Lock for over 20 years. They always have what I need in stock, and their product knowledge is unmatched. Best supplier in New England.

reviews.name: Property Manager
reviews.text: Great selection of commercial hardware and very competitive wholesale pricing. Their staff helped me spec out an entire building rekey — saved me time and money.

reviews.name: Security Contractor
reviews.text: Commonwealth Lock is my go-to for specialty hardware. If they don't have it on the shelf, they'll source it fast. Family-run business that treats you right.
